mikiwi.title: MiKiWi
mikiwi.shortDescription: A full-stack e-commerce application built with Laravel, React and Inertia.js.
mikiwi.description: A full-stack e-commerce application built with Laravel, React and Inertia.js, focused on product customization, maintainable architecture and relational data modelling.
mikiwi.challenge: The main challenge was structuring a customizable e-commerce platform without concentrating business logic in controllers or tightly coupling the user interface to the backend.
mikiwi.solution: I designed a modular application with Laravel, React and Inertia.js, separating responsibilities and organizing the core business logic around Domain-Driven Design principles.
technicalDecisions: Laravel migrations, seeders and Eloquent ORM for database management.
React and Inertia.js for the user interface.
Git Flow for structured branch management.
A Continuous Integration workflow with GitHub Actions.
Redsys as the selected payment gateway.
Supabase as the managed PostgreSQL platform.
mikiwi.learning: This project deepened my understanding of software architecture, relational data modelling, API design and the importance of keeping business logic independent from framework-specific concerns.
mikiwi.imageAlt: Animated preview of the MiKiWi e-commerce application
